name: agent-squad
tagline: Your AI coding squad works 24/7 — non-stop, crash-proof, ready for review anytime
description: Run persistent AI coding agents in tmux sessions. Assign tasks, they code around the clock. If they crash, a watchdog auto-restarts them. Check progress anytime through natural language. Supports 8 AI engines: Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, OpenCode, Kimi, Trae, Aider, and Goose.
